title: Section 15
content: If, on a transfer of property, an interest therein is created for the benefit of a class of persons with regard to some of whom such interest fails by reason of any of the rules contained in sections 13 and 14; such interest fails 1[in regard to those persons only and not in regard to the whole class.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 20 of 1929, s. 9, for "as regards the whole class".
